name: Routing Without Training: Controllable-Ratio LLM Offloading via Reliability Gating

description: arXiv:2607.20481v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Local-cloud collaboration is a practical way to deploy large language models under resource constraints, but existing methods often rely on trained routers or collaboration-aware finetuning that tie routing behavior to a particular operating regime. In this work, we show that such training may be unnecessary: the local model's own inference-time a...
author: Evan Chen, Shiqiang Wang, Kevin S Chan, Su Wang, Christopher Brinton
